label: Progress bar
summary: A segmented progress bar: sunken track, chunky accent blocks, optional marching indeterminate mode.
era: The file-copy dialog: a sunken track filling with chunky blue blocks, eight pixels at a time.
a11y: role="progressbar" with aria-valuemin/max/now and an aria-label, as in the snippet; indeterminate mode omits aria-valuenow.
